ddls:
CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the security */,
  "series" TEXT /* Series of the security (e.g., EQ, GS) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the security */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the security is listed */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) */,
  "face_value" REAL /* Face value of the security */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the security */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the security */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the security */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the security (active/inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_securities_exchange FOREIGN KEY ("exchange") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the security ID */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "prev_close" REAL /* Previous day's closing price */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the day */,
  "last_price" REAL /* Last traded price */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price */,
  "avg_price" REAL /* Average price */,
  "total_traded_quantity" INTEGER /* Total traded quantity */,
  "turnover_lacs" REAL /* Turnover in lakhs */,
  "number_of_trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades */,
  "delivery_quantity" INTEGER /* Delivery quantity */,
  "delivery_percentage" REAL /* Delivery percentage */,
  "volume_50_day_avg" REAL /* 50-day average trading volume */,
  "volume_200_day_avg" REAL /* 200-day average trading volume */,
  "relative_strength_index" REAL /* Relative strength index */,
  "moving_averages" REAL /* Moving averages */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_market_data_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Account status of the user (active/inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES daily_market_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trading strategy */,
  "strategy_type" TEXT /* Type of trading strategy */,
  "backtesting_results" TEXT /* Results of backtesting the strategy */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_strategies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_holding" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio holding */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the holding */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security in the holding */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the security held */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the security was purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of purchase */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the holding */,
  "pnl" REAL /* Profit and loss of the holding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holding_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holding_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the trade */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security traded */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the security traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade */,
  "fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  "report_size" REAL /* Size of the report file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance rule */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the compliance rule */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the compliance rule */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the rule becomes effective */,
  "rule_category" TEXT /* Category of the compliance rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
